option.name: filePath
option.value: /AltaraGames (snapshot).java

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
filePath
option.value: /Game (snapshot).java

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
filePath
option.value: /KitWaller (snapshot).java

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
filePath
option.value: /MapLoader (snapshot).java

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
filePath
option.value: /ProfileService (snapshot).java

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
filePath
option.value: /StaffChat (snapshot).java

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
filePath
option.value: /pom (snapshot).xml

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<groupId>games.sparking</groupId> <artifactId>Altara-Parent</artifactId> <version>1.0-SNAPSHOT</version> <packaging>pom</packaging>
<modules> <module>Altara-Shared</module> <module>Altara-Paper</module> <module>Altara-Proxy</module> <module>Altara-Lobby</module> <module>Altara-Games</module> <module>Altara-Web</module> </modules>
<properties> <java.version>25</java.version> <maven.compiler.release>${java.version}</maven.compiler.release> <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding>
<!-- Dependency versions --> <lombok.version>1.18.46</lombok.version> <commons-lang3.version>3.20.0</commons-lang3.version> <jedis.version>7.5.0</jedis.version> <mongodb.version>5.4.0</mongodb.version> <paper-api.version>1.21.4-R0.1-SNAPSHOT</paper-api.version> <velocity-api.version>3.4.0-SNAPSHOT</velocity-api.version> <okhttp.version>4.12.0</okhttp.version> <spring-boot.version>3.4.5</spring-boot.version> <packetevents.version>2.12.1</packetevents.version> <entitylib.version>2.4.11</entitylib.version> </properties>
<repositories> <repository> <id>papermc</id> <url>https://repo.papermc.io/repository/maven-public/</url> </repository> <repository> <id>jitpack</id> <url>https://jitpack.io</url> </repository> </repositories>
<dependencyManagement> <dependencies> <!-- Spring Boot BOM --> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-dependencies</artifactId> <version>${spring-boot.version}</version> <type>pom</type> <scope>import</scope> </dependency>
<!-- Altara Modules --> <dependency> <groupId>games.sparking</groupId> <artifactId>Altara-Shared</artifactId> <version>${project.version}</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>games.sparking</groupId> <artifactId>Altara-Paper</artifactId> <version>${project.version}</version> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency>
<!-- Lombok (compile-time only) --> <dependency> <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId> <artifactId>lombok</artifactId> <version>${lombok.version}</version> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency>
<!-- Apache Commons --> <dependency> <groupId>org.apache.commons</groupId> <artifactId>commons-lang3</artifactId> <version>${commons-lang3.version}</version> </dependency>
<!-- Redis (Jedis) --> <dependency> <groupId>redis.clients</groupId> <artifactId>jedis</artifactId> <version>${jedis.version}</version> </dependency>
<!-- MongoDB Driver (all three artifacts must be the same version) --> <dependency> <groupId>org.mongodb</groupId> <artifactId>bson</artifactId> <version>${mongodb.version}</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.mongodb</groupId> <artifactId>mongodb-driver-core</artifactId> <version>${mongodb.version}</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.mongodb</groupId> <artifactId>mongodb-driver-sync</artifactId> <version>${mongodb.version}</version> </dependency>
<!-- Paper API --> <dependency> <groupId>io.papermc.paper</groupId> <artifactId>paper-api</artifactId> <version>${paper-api.version}</version> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency>
<!-- Velocity API --> <dependency> <groupId>com.velocitypowered</groupId> <artifactId>velocity-api</artifactId> <version>${velocity-api.version}</version> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency>
<!-- OkHttp --> <dependency> <groupId>com.squareup.okhttp3</groupId> <artifactId>okhttp</artifactId> <version>${okhttp.version}</version> </dependency>
<!-- PacketEvents (provided — runs as its own server plugin) --> <dependency> <groupId>com.github.retrooper</groupId> <artifactId>packetevents-spigot</artifactId> <version>${packetevents.version}</version> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency>
<!-- EntityLib (shaded into the plugin jar) --> <dependency> <groupId>com.github.Tofaa2.EntityLib</groupId> <artifactId>spigot</artifactId> <version>${entitylib.version}</version> </dependency> </dependencies> </dependencyManagement>
<!-- Dependencies available to every module --> <dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId> <artifactId>lombok</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.apache.commons</groupId> <artifactId>commons-lang3</artifactId> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <!-- Include version.properties from the root of the multi-module project in every module JAR --> <resources> <resource> <directory>${maven.multiModuleProjectDirectory}</directory> <includes> <include>version.properties</include> </includes> </resource> <resource> <directory>src/main/resources</directory> </resource> </resources>
<pluginManagement> <plugins> <!-- Compiler: Java 25 with Lombok annotation processing --> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.13.0</version> <configuration> <release>${java.version}</release> <parameters>true</parameters> <annotationProcessorPaths> <path> <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId> <artifactId>lombok</artifactId> <version>${lombok.version}</version> </path> </annotationProcessorPaths> </configuration> </plugin>
<!-- Shade: fat JAR with package relocation --> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-shade-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.6.0</version> <dependencies> <!-- Override ASM to support Java 25 (class file major version 69) --> <dependency> <groupId>org.ow2.asm</groupId> <artifactId>asm</artifactId> <version>9.8</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.ow2.asm</groupId> <artifactId>asm-commons</artifactId> <version>9.8</version> </dependency> </dependencies> <configuration> <createDependencyReducedPom>false</createDependencyReducedPom> </configuration> <executions> <execution> <phase>package</phase> <goals> <goal>shade</goal> </goals> </execution> </executions> </plugin> </plugins> </pluginManagement> </build>
</project>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<groupId>games.sparking</groupId> <artifactId>Altara-Parent</artifactId> <version>1.0-SNAPSHOT</version> <packaging>pom</packaging>
<modules> <module>Altara-Shared</module> <module>Altara-Paper</module> <module>Altara-Proxy</module> <module>Altara-Lobby</module> <module>Altara-Games</module> <module>Altara-Web</module> </modules>
<properties> <java.version>25</java.version> <maven.compiler.release>${java.version}</maven.compiler.release> <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding>
<!-- Dependency versions --> <lombok.version>1.18.46</lombok.version> <commons-lang3.version>3.20.0</commons-lang3.version> <jedis.version>7.5.0</jedis.version> <mongodb.version>5.4.0</mongodb.version> <paper-api.version>1.21.4-R0.1-SNAPSHOT</paper-api.version> <velocity-api.version>3.4.0-SNAPSHOT</velocity-api.version> <okhttp.version>4.12.0</okhttp.version> <spring-boot.version>3.4.5</spring-boot.version> <packetevents.version>2.12.1</packetevents.version> <entitylib.version>2.4.11</entitylib.version> </properties>
<repositories> <repository> <id>papermc</id> <url>https://repo.papermc.io/repository/maven-public/</url> </repository> <repository> <id>codemc-releases</id> <url>https://repo.codemc.io/repository/maven-releases/</url> </repository> <repository> <id>jitpack</id> <url>https://jitpack.io</url> </repository> </repositories>
<dependencyManagement> <dependencies> <!-- Spring Boot BOM --> <dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-dependencies</artifactId> <version>${spring-boot.version}</version> <type>pom</type> <scope>import</scope> </dependency>
<!-- Altara Modules --> <dependency> <groupId>games.sparking</groupId> <artifactId>Altara-Shared</artifactId> <version>${project.version}</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>games.sparking</groupId> <artifactId>Altara-Paper</artifactId> <version>${project.version}</version> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency>
<!-- Lombok (compile-time only) --> <dependency> <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId> <artifactId>lombok</artifactId> <version>${lombok.version}</version> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency>
<!-- Apache Commons --> <dependency> <groupId>org.apache.commons</groupId> <artifactId>commons-lang3</artifactId> <version>${commons-lang3.version}</version> </dependency>
<!-- Redis (Jedis) --> <dependency> <groupId>redis.clients</groupId> <artifactId>jedis</artifactId> <version>${jedis.version}</version> </dependency>
<!-- MongoDB Driver (all three artifacts must be the same version) --> <dependency> <groupId>org.mongodb</groupId> <artifactId>bson</artifactId> <version>${mongodb.version}</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.mongodb</groupId> <artifactId>mongodb-driver-core</artifactId> <version>${mongodb.version}</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.mongodb</groupId> <artifactId>mongodb-driver-sync</artifactId> <version>${mongodb.version}</version> </dependency>
<!-- Paper API --> <dependency> <groupId>io.papermc.paper</groupId> <artifactId>paper-api</artifactId> <version>${paper-api.version}</version> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency>
<!-- Velocity API --> <dependency> <groupId>com.velocitypowered</groupId> <artifactId>velocity-api</artifactId> <version>${velocity-api.version}</version> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency>
<!-- OkHttp --> <dependency> <groupId>com.squareup.okhttp3</groupId> <artifactId>okhttp</artifactId> <version>${okhttp.version}</version> </dependency>
<!-- PacketEvents (provided — runs as its own server plugin) --> <dependency> <groupId>com.github.retrooper</groupId> <artifactId>packetevents-spigot</artifactId> <version>${packetevents.version}</version> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency>
<!-- EntityLib (shaded into the plugin jar) --> <dependency> <groupId>com.github.Tofaa2.EntityLib</groupId> <artifactId>spigot</artifactId> <version>${entitylib.version}</version> </dependency> </dependencies> </dependencyManagement>
<!-- Dependencies available to every module --> <dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId> <artifactId>lombok</artifactId> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.apache.commons</groupId> <artifactId>commons-lang3</artifactId> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <!-- Include version.properties from the root of the multi-module project in every module JAR --> <resources> <resource> <directory>${maven.multiModuleProjectDirectory}</directory> <includes> <include>version.properties</include> </includes> </resource> <resource> <directory>src/main/resources</directory> </resource> </resources>
<pluginManagement> <plugins> <!-- Compiler: Java 25 with Lombok annotation processing --> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.13.0</version> <configuration> <release>${java.version}</release> <parameters>true</parameters> <annotationProcessorPaths> <path> <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId> <artifactId>lombok</artifactId> <version>${lombok.version}</version> </path> </annotationProcessorPaths> </configuration> </plugin>
<!-- Shade: fat JAR with package relocation --> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-shade-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.6.0</version> <dependencies> <!-- Override ASM to support Java 25 (class file major version 69) --> <dependency> <groupId>org.ow2.asm</groupId> <artifactId>asm</artifactId> <version>9.8</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>org.ow2.asm</groupId> <artifactId>asm-commons</artifactId> <version>9.8</version> </dependency> </dependencies> <configuration> <createDependencyReducedPom>false</createDependencyReducedPom> </configuration> <executions> <execution> <phase>package</phase> <goals> <goal>shade</goal> </goals> </execution> </executions> </plugin> </plugins> </pluginManagement> </build>
</project>
